description: Defines all ways the appendicitis encounter can end — win states, lose states, disposition decisions, and the Mega Hospital escape hatch.

win_conditions.name: Appendectomy Completed
win_conditions.description: Player successfully performs appendectomy with prerequisites met.
win_conditions.meddy_feedback: Surgery complete! Now — where are we sending this patient?

lose_conditions.name: AP Depleted — Coma/Fail State
lose_conditions.description: Patient reaches 0 AP remaining without appendectomy. Patient enters coma/fail state.
lose_conditions.meddy_feedback: We've run out of time. The patient has deteriorated beyond recovery. An ambulance is on the way to transfer to Mega Hospital.
lose_conditions.note: No disposition prompt. Encounter ends immediately.

lose_conditions.name: Mega Hospital Transfer
lose_conditions.description: Player attempts an action they cannot afford. MEDDY offers ambulance transfer to Mega Hospital.

popup.meddy_feedback: You don't have enough AP for that. Want me to call an ambulance to transfer to Mega Hospital?

lose_conditions.name: Mega Hospital Transfer — Appendectomy Unaffordable
lose_conditions.description: Player tries to perform appendectomy but cannot afford the 10 AP cost. Special case — awards 3 bonus points for recognizing the need for surgery.

popup.meddy_feedback: You don't have enough AP to perform the appendectomy. But you knew what this patient needed — that counts for something. Want me to call an ambulance to transfer to Mega Hospital?

options.label: Yes — call the ambulance
options.meddy_feedback_on_confirm: Ambulance is on the way. You knew the diagnosis and the treatment — just ran out of time. 3 bonus points awarded for clinical insight.

disposition_prompt.description: After successful appendectomy, MEDDY asks where to send the patient. All options cost 0 AP.
disposition_prompt.meddy_prompt: Surgery went well! Where are we sending this patient?

admit_hospital.meddy_feedback: Good call. Routine post-op admission to the floor. The patient will do great!

admit_icu.meddy_feedback: ICU attending declines — this patient doesn't need that level of care after a routine appendectomy. Admitting to the hospital floor instead.

discharge_home.meddy_feedback: Sounds good! Routine laparoscopic appendectomy — safe to go home with follow-up instructions. See you next time!

admit_hospital.meddy_feedback: Right call. Perforated appendix needs inpatient monitoring, IV antibiotics, and wound care. Good thinking.

admit_icu.meddy_feedback: ICU attending declines — perforated appendix is serious but doesn't require ICU level care. Admitting to the hospital floor instead.

discharge_home.meddy_feedback: Hmm — discharging a perforated appendix patient isn't ideal, but it's your call. They'll need very close follow-up.

admit_hospital.meddy_feedback: Floor attending refused — this patient just came out of septic shock and needs ICU level monitoring. Admitting to the ICU instead.

admit_icu.meddy_feedback: Absolutely the right call. Post-op septic shock patient needs ICU monitoring, vasopressor weaning, and close observation. Great decision.

discharge_home.meddy_feedback: I'm not comfortable discharging this patient home — they just came out of septic shock. I'm initiating ICU admission.

ambulance.description: An ambulance arrives and whisks the patient away. Used for all hospital and ICU admissions, and for Mega Hospital transfers.
ambulance.meddy_feedback: The ambulance is here. Safe travels — you did good work today.

patient_walks_out.description: Patient walks out on their own. Used for discharge to home.
patient_walks_out.meddy_feedback: There they go! Make sure they have their discharge instructions.

mega_hospital_transfer.description: Ambulance transfers patient to Mega Hospital. Encounter is lost.
mega_hospital_transfer.meddy_feedback: Mega Hospital will take good care of them. We'll do better next time.

scoring_summary.note: Disposition bonus points and harm points applied before final XP calculation.
